name: relax-structures
description: Perform atomic structure relaxation (geometry optimisation) using MatterSim force-field models.

structures.description: One or more ASE Atoms objects to relax. May originate from files on disk (CIF, POSCAR, XYZ, extxyz), ASE bulk builders, inline coordinates, or pymatgen Structure objects.

filter.description: Cell filter for variable-cell relaxation. null keeps cell fixed.

pressure.description: External target pressure for cell relaxation. Implies filter=FrechetCellFilter when filter is null. The value is interpreted according to pressure_unit.

pressure_unit.description: Unit of the pressure value. Conversion: 1 eV/Å³ = 160.2176621 GPa = 1602.176621 kbar.

constrain_symmetry.description: Whether to constrain crystal symmetry during relaxation via ASE FixSymmetry. Preserves the space-group symmetry of the input structure throughout the optimisation.

relax_results.json.description: Combined JSON with metadata, settings, units, and per-structure input/output (positions, cell, energy, forces, stress, convergence).

relax_NNN_FORMULA.cif.description: Relaxed structure in CIF format (periodic) or XYZ format (non-periodic), one per structure.

terminal_table.description: Formatted summary table printed to the terminal.
